title: HTML
overview: HTML (HyperText Markup Language) is the foundation of all web pages. It provides the structure and meaning to content on the web. Master semantic HTML to build accessible, SEO-friendly websites that work across all devices.

modules.title: Introduction to HTML
modules.description: History of HTML, how the web works, browsers, and development tools setup with VS Code and Live Server.

modules.title: HTML Elements
modules.description: Understanding HTML tags, elements, attributes, nesting rules, and the document tree structure.

modules.title: Attributes
modules.description: Global attributes like id, class, style, and data-*. Using href, src, alt, title, and custom attributes.

modules.title: Headings
modules.description: h1-h6 hierarchy, proper document structure, accessibility implications, and SEO best practices for headings.

modules.title: Paragraphs
modules.description: p, span, br, hr tags. Text formatting with strong, em, and whitespace handling in HTML documents.

modules.title: Links
modules.description: Anchor tags, href attribute, absolute vs relative URLs, target, download, and internal page navigation.

modules.title: Images
modules.description: img tag, srcset for responsive images, figure and figcaption, alt text, and image format optimization.

modules.title: Lists
modules.description: Ordered (ol), unordered (ul), definition (dl) lists, nesting, and styling list elements with CSS.

modules.title: Tables
modules.description: Table structure with thead, tbody, tfoot, colspan, rowspan, caption, and accessibility best practices.

modules.title: Forms
modules.description: Form tag, action/method, input types (text, email, password, checkbox, radio), select, textarea, labels.

modules.title: Semantic HTML
modules.description: header, nav, main, section, article, aside, footer, and semantic best practices for accessibility and SEO.

modules.title: Accessibility
modules.description: WCAG guidelines, ARIA roles and attributes, keyboard navigation, screen reader compatibility, color contrast.

modules.title: SEO Basics
modules.description: Meta tags, Open Graph protocol, Twitter Cards, JSON-LD structured data, and search engine optimization.

modules.title: HTML Projects
modules.description: Apply all HTML knowledge in real-world projects. Build portfolio pages, landing pages, and interactive sites.

title: Java
overview: Java is a robust, object-oriented programming language renowned for its "write once, run anywhere" capability. It powers enterprise applications, Android apps, web services, and large-scale systems worldwide.

modules.title: Java Fundamentals
modules.description: JVM, JRE, JDK, main method, package declaration, import statements, primitive types, variables

modules.title: Operators & Control Flow
modules.description: Arithmetic, relational, logical, bitwise operators. if-else, switch, for, while, do-while, break, continue

modules.title: Arrays & Strings
modules.description: Array declaration and initialization, multidimensional arrays, String methods, StringBuilder, StringBuffer

modules.title: Object-Oriented Java
modules.description: Classes, objects, constructors, this keyword, static, encapsulation, getters/setters, access modifiers

modules.title: Inheritance & Polymorphism
modules.description: extends, super, method overriding, @Override, final keyword, abstract classes, interfaces

modules.title: Collections Framework
modules.description: ArrayList, LinkedList, HashSet, TreeSet, HashMap, TreeMap, Comparable, Comparator, iterators

modules.title: Generics & Enums
modules.description: Generic classes, methods, bounded type parameters, wildcards, enum types with fields and methods

modules.title: Exception Handling
modules.description: try-catch-finally, checked vs unchecked exceptions, throws, custom exceptions, try-with-resources

modules.title: Lambda & Streams
modules.description: Functional interfaces, lambda expressions, method references, Stream API (map, filter, reduce, collect)

modules.title: File I/O & Serialization
modules.description: FileReader/Writer, BufferedReader, NIO Files API, Object serialization, transient keyword

modules.title: Multithreading & Concurrency
modules.description: Thread class, Runnable, synchronized, wait/notify, ExecutorService, CompletableFuture, locks

modules.title: JDBC & Database
modules.description: Connection, Statement, PreparedStatement, ResultSet, transactions, connection pooling (HikariCP)

modules.title: Testing with JUnit
modules.description: JUnit 5, assertions, parameterized tests, test lifecycle, mocking with Mockito, code coverage

modules.title: Spring Boot
modules.description: IoC, DI, Spring MVC, REST controllers, @Autowired, application.properties, embedded Tomcat

modules.title: Spring Data JPA / Hibernate
modules.description: ORM, entities, repositories, JPQL, native queries, cascading, fetch types, migrations (Flyway)

modules.title: Microservices Architecture
modules.description: Spring Cloud, service discovery (Eureka), API gateway, circuit breakers, distributed tracing

modules.title: Reactive Programming
modules.description: Project Reactor, WebFlux, reactive streams, Mono/Flux, backpressure, reactive MongoDB

modules.title: Performance & Security
modules.description: JVM tuning, garbage collection, profiling (JProfiler), OWASP, Spring Security, JWT authentication

title: JavaScript
overview: JavaScript is the programming language of the web, powering interactive experiences, dynamic content, and full-stack applications. Master JavaScript to build anything from simple scripts to complex web apps.

modules.title: JS Fundamentals
modules.description: Variables (var, let, const), data types (string, number, boolean, null, undefined), type coercion, console.log

modules.title: Operators & Conditionals
modules.description: Arithmetic, comparison, logical operators, if/else, switch, ternary operator, truthy/falsy values

modules.title: Loops & Iteration
modules.description: for, while, do-while, for...of, for...in, break, continue, iterating arrays and objects

modules.title: Functions
modules.description: Function declarations, expressions, arrow functions, parameters, return values, scope, hoisting

modules.title: Arrays & Objects
modules.description: Array methods (push, pop, map, filter, reduce, find), object literals, property access, destructuring

modules.title: DOM Manipulation
modules.description: querySelector, createElement, textContent, classList, style, appendChild, event listeners

modules.title: Events & Event Handling
modules.description: addEventListener, event object, event propagation (bubbling/capturing), event delegation, preventDefault

modules.title: ES6+ Features
modules.description: Template literals, spread/rest, default parameters, destructuring, enhanced object literals, modules

modules.title: Asynchronous JavaScript
modules.description: Callbacks, Promises, async/await, fetch API, setTimeout/setInterval, handling errors with try/catch

modules.title: Closures & Scope
modules.description: Lexical scope, closure patterns, module pattern, IIFE, hoisting explained, temporal dead zone, this keyword

modules.title: Prototypes & Classes
modules.description: Prototypal inheritance, constructor functions, class syntax, extends, super, static methods, getters/setters

modules.title: Error Handling & Debugging
modules.description: try/catch/finally, custom errors, Error object, stack traces, Chrome DevTools debugging, breakpoints

modules.title: Design Patterns
modules.description: Module, singleton, observer, factory, pub/sub, MVC, proxy patterns in JavaScript

modules.title: JavaScript & TypeScript
modules.description: TypeScript basics, interfaces, types, generics, enums, type guards, migrating JS to TS

modules.title: Performance Optimization
modules.description: Debouncing, throttling, lazy loading, memoization, Web Workers, requestAnimationFrame, memory leaks

modules.title: Testing JavaScript
modules.description: Unit testing with Jest, assertions, mocks, spies, TDD, integration tests, E2E testing with Cypress

modules.title: Build Tools & Bundlers
modules.description: Webpack, Vite, Babel, ESLint, Prettier, npm scripts, module bundling, tree shaking, code splitting

modules.title: Service Workers & PWAs
modules.description: Service worker lifecycle, caching strategies, offline support, push notifications, manifest.json, Workbox

title: Kotlin
overview: Kotlin is a modern, cross-platform, statically typed programming language developed by JetBrains. First released in 2016, Kotlin is fully interoperable with Java and has become the preferred language for Android development (officially supported by Google since 2017). It combines functional and object-oriented programming paradigms with a concise syntax.

modules.title: Kotlin Basics
modules.description: Installing Kotlin, Hello World, basic syntax, fun keyword, main function, REPL with Kotlin playground, and IntelliJ IDEA setup.

modules.title: Variables & Types
modules.description: val vs var, type inference, basic types (Int, Long, Double, Float, Boolean, Char, String), type conversion, and string templates.

modules.title: Null Safety
modules.description: Nullable types (?), safe call operator (?.), Elvis operator (?:), not-null assertion (!!), safe casts (as?), and let/apply/run scope functions.

modules.title: Control Flow
modules.description: if as expression, when (replacement for switch), for loops, while loops, ranges (1..10), and break/continue labels.

modules.title: Functions & Lambdas
modules.description: Function syntax, default and named parameters, varargs, single-expression functions, lambda syntax, higher-order functions, and inline functions.

modules.title: Classes & Objects
modules.description: Class declaration, constructors (primary/secondary), init blocks, properties, getters/setters, open classes, and abstract classes.

modules.title: Inheritance & Interfaces
modules.description: Open keyword for inheritance, overriding methods, interface definition and implementation, properties in interfaces, and multiple interface inheritance.

modules.title: Data Classes & Sealed Classes
modules.description: Data class auto-generation (equals, hashCode, toString, copy, componentN), destructuring declarations, sealed classes for restricted hierarchies.

modules.title: Collections & Functional API
modules.description: List, Set, Map (mutable vs immutable), filter, map, flatMap, reduce, fold, groupBy, sortedBy, chunked, and sequence (lazy evaluation).

modules.title: Extension Functions & Properties
modules.description: Adding methods to existing classes, extension properties, companion object extensions, and scope functions (let, apply, run, also, takeIf).

modules.title: Generics & Delegation
modules.description: Generic classes and functions, variance (in/out), reified type parameters, class delegation (by keyword), and property delegation (lazy, observable).

modules.title: Coroutines & Concurrency
modules.description: Coroutines basics (launch, async), suspend functions, coroutine scopes (GlobalScope, viewModelScope), dispatchers, channels, and flow.

modules.title: DSLs & Type Safety
modules.description: Building type-safe DSLs with lambda with receiver, @DslMarker, invoke operator, and practical DSL examples for HTML or testing.

modules.title: Testing with Kotlin
modules.description: JUnit 5 with Kotlin, Kotlin Test assertions, property-based testing with Kotest, mocking with MockK, and coroutine testing.

title: Linux
overview: Linux is a free, open-source operating system kernel created by Linus Torvalds in 1991. It powers the majority of servers, cloud infrastructure, embedded systems, Android devices, and supercomputers worldwide.

modules.title: Getting Started with Linux
modules.description: Choosing a distro (Ubuntu, Fedora, etc.), installation, desktop environment vs CLI, terminal basics, man pages, --help.

modules.title: Filesystem & Navigation
modules.description: Linux filesystem hierarchy (/, /home, /var, /etc, /usr), ls, cd, pwd, mkdir, rmdir, cp, mv, rm, find, locate.

modules.title: File Operations & Permissions
modules.description: cat, less, more, head, tail, wc, chmod, chown, chgrp, umask, file types, symlinks (ln -s), wildcards.

modules.title: Users, Groups & Permissions
modules.description: useradd/usermod/userdel, groupadd/groupmod, sudo, /etc/passwd, /etc/shadow, /etc/group, su, sudoers file.

modules.title: Process Management
modules.description: ps, top, htop, kill, pkill, killall, nice/renice, bg/fg, jobs, nohup, &, /proc filesystem, systemd services.

modules.title: Package Management
modules.description: apt (Debian/Ubuntu), dnf/yum (Fedora/RHEL), pacman (Arch), snap, flatpak, adding repos, dpkg/rpm basics.

modules.title: Text Processing & Pipes
modules.description: grep, sed, awk, cut, sort, uniq, tr, tee, xargs, pipelines (|), I/O redirection (>, >>, <, 2>), /dev/null.

modules.title: Shell Scripting Basics
modules.description: Bash scripts, variables, conditionals (if/else), loops (for, while), functions, exit codes, positional parameters.

modules.title: Networking
modules.description: ip, ifconfig, ss, netstat, ping, traceroute, curl, wget, DNS (/etc/resolv.conf), /etc/hosts, nmap, netcat.

modules.title: SSH & Remote Access
modules.description: ssh, ssh-keygen, authorized_keys, scp, rsync, sshd_config, port forwarding, tunneling, SSH agents.

modules.title: Systemd & Service Management
modules.description: systemctl, journalctl, unit files, timers (cron replacement), targets, service dependencies, systemd-analyze.

modules.title: Firewall & Security
modules.description: iptables/nftables, ufw, firewalld, fail2ban, SELinux, AppArmor, auditd, logwatch, rkhunter, clamav.

modules.title: Storage & LVM
modules.description: fdisk, parted, mkfs, mount, /etc/fstab, LVM (pvcreate, vgcreate, lvcreate), RAID, df, du, lsblk.

modules.title: Logging & Monitoring
modules.description: rsyslog, syslog-ng, logrotate, /var/log, journald, Prometheus/node_exporter, Grafana, Nagios/Zabbix.

modules.title: Performance Tuning
modules.description: vmstat, iostat, mpstat, sar, perf, strace, ltrace, ulimit, sysctl tuning, kernel parameters, cgroups.

modules.title: Containers & Virtualization
modules.description: Docker on Linux, LXC/LXD, KVM/qemu, Vagrant, cgroups, namespaces, container security.

title: MongoDB
overview: MongoDB is a leading NoSQL document database that stores data in flexible, JSON-like documents. Developed by MongoDB Inc., it provides high performance, horizontal scalability, and a rich query language for modern applications.

modules.title: Introduction & Setup
modules.description: Installing MongoDB, MongoDB Shell (mongosh), MongoDB Compass GUI, connecting to local/Atlas instances, basic terminology.

modules.title: CRUD Operations
modules.description: insertOne/insertMany, find with filters, updateOne/updateMany/ replaceOne, deleteOne/deleteMany, bulk writes.

modules.title: Query Operators
modules.description: Comparison ($eq, $gt, $lt, $in), logical ($and, $or, $not), element ($exists, $type), array ($all, $elemMatch), regex.

modules.title: Document Structure & Data Types
modules.description: BSON types, ObjectId, embedded documents, arrays, dates, ObjectId generation, document size limits (16MB).

modules.title: Indexing
modules.description: Single field indexes, compound indexes, multikey indexes, text indexes, unique indexes, explain() for query analysis.

modules.title: Aggregation Pipeline
modules.description: $match, $group, $sort, $project, $lookup (JOINs), $unwind, $bucket, $facet, $addFields, aggregation expressions.

modules.title: Schema Design & Data Modeling
modules.description: Embedding vs referencing, one-to-one, one-to-many, many-to-many patterns, schema anti-patterns, polymorphic schemas.

modules.title: Mongoose ODM
modules.description: Schemas, models, validation, middleware (pre/post hooks), virtuals, population, plugins, discriminators.

modules.title: Replica Sets & High Availability
modules.description: Primary/secondary/arbiter nodes, automatic failover, read preferences, write concerns, election process.

modules.title: Sharding & Horizontal Scaling
modules.description: Shard keys, config servers, mongos routers, chunk splitting/migration, shard zones, hashed sharding.

modules.title: Transactions
modules.description: Multi-document ACID transactions, session API, transaction lifetime, retry logic, transaction vs atomicity limitations.

modules.title: Security & Authentication
modules.description: RBAC, SCRAM authentication, x.509 certificates, LDAP integration, field-level encryption, audit logging.

modules.title: Change Streams & Real-Time Data
modules.description: Watching collections for changes, resume tokens, pipeline filtering, integration with Kafka/RabbitMQ.

modules.title: GeoSpatial & Time-Series
modules.description: GeoJSON objects, 2dsphere indexes, $near/$geoNear queries, time-series collections, bucket aggregation.

modules.title: Backup, Restore & Maintenance
modules.description: mongodump/mongorestore, Atlas backups, point-in-time recovery, compaction, data validation, index building.

modules.title: MongoDB Atlas & Cloud
modules.description: Atlas clusters, serverless instances, Atlas Search, Data Lake, Realm Sync, Atlas App Services, monitoring.

title: MySQL
overview: MySQL is the world's most popular open-source relational database management system. Developed originally by MySQL AB (founded by David Axmark, Allan Larsson, and Michael Widenius) and now owned by Oracle Corporation, MySQL powers millions of web applications, from personal blogs to large-scale enterprise systems.

modules.title: Installing & Configuring MySQL
modules.description: Downloading MySQL, installation on Windows/Mac/Linux, MySQL Workbench setup, CLI access, my.cnf configuration basics.

modules.title: MySQL Data Types
modules.description: Numeric types (INT, DECIMAL, FLOAT), string types (VARCHAR, TEXT, BLOB), date/time types (DATE, DATETIME, TIMESTAMP), ENUM, SET, and JSON type.

modules.title: Database & Table Operations
modules.description: CREATE DATABASE, USE, CREATE TABLE with constraints (NOT NULL, UNIQUE, DEFAULT), ALTER TABLE, DROP TABLE, TRUNCATE, and table options.

modules.title: CRUD Operations
modules.description: INSERT (single/multiple rows), SELECT with WHERE/ORDER BY/LIMIT, UPDATE with JOINs, DELETE with JOINs, and INSERT ... ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE.

modules.title: MySQL Functions
modules.description: String functions (CONCAT, SUBSTRING, REPLACE, TRIM), numeric functions (ROUND, CEILING, FLOOR), date functions (NOW, DATE_FORMAT, DATEDIFF), and aggregate functions.

modules.title: Joins & Relationships
modules.description: INNER JOIN, LEFT/RIGHT JOIN, FULL JOIN simulation, CROSS JOIN, SELF JOIN, joining with USING/ON, and foreign key constraints with CASCADE.

modules.title: Indexing for Performance
modules.description: B-tree indexes, UNIQUE indexes, composite indexes (column order), FULLTEXT indexes for search, SPATIAL indexes, and index hints (USE INDEX, FORCE INDEX).

modules.title: Views & Derived Tables
modules.description: CREATE VIEW, updatable views, WITH CHECK OPTION, ALTER/REPLACE VIEW, VIEW metadata, and performance considerations of views.

modules.title: Stored Procedures
modules.description: CREATE PROCEDURE, parameters (IN, OUT, INOUT), variables, DECLARE, cursors, loop constructs, and procedure management.

modules.title: Functions & Triggers
modules.description: Creating stored functions, deterministic vs not deterministic, triggers (BEFORE/AFTER INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE), trigger limitations, and event scheduler.

modules.title: Transactions & Locking
modules.description: START TRANSACTION, COMMIT, ROLLBACK, SAVEPOINT, isolation levels (READ UNCOMMITTED to SERIALIZABLE), row-level vs table-level locks, deadlocks.

modules.title: Query Optimization & EXPLAIN
modules.description: EXPLAIN output, type (ALL, range, ref, eq_ref, const), key length, Extra info (Using index, Using filesort), slow query log, and optimizer hints.

modules.title: Replication & Backup
modules.description: Master-slave replication, binary logs, GTID replication, group replication, mysqldump, mysqlpump, XtraBackup, point-in-time recovery.

modules.title: MySQL Security & Administration
modules.description: User management (CREATE USER, GRANT, REVOKE), authentication plugins, SSL/TLS, firewall, auditing, MySQL Enterprise vs Community edition.

title: Node.js
overview: Node.js is an open-source, cross-platform JavaScript runtime built on Chrome's V8 JavaScript engine. Created by Ryan Dahl in 2009, Node.js revolutionized server-side programming by bringing JavaScript to the backend. Its event-driven, non-blocking I/O model makes it ideal for building scalable network applications, real-time services, and microservices.

modules.title: Getting Started with Node.js
modules.description: Installing Node.js, Node REPL, running scripts, global vs local variables, process object, and understanding the event loop.

modules.title: Modules & npm
modules.description: CommonJS (require/module.exports), ES modules (import/export), package.json, semantic versioning, creating and publishing packages.

modules.title: File System & Paths
modules.description: fs module (sync/async/promises), reading/writing files, directories, streams, path module, and file watching with fs.watch.

modules.title: Event Emitter & Buffers
modules.description: EventEmitter pattern, custom events, EventEmitter vs DOM events, Buffer class for binary data, and TypedArrays.

modules.title: Error Handling & Debugging
modules.description: Try/catch in async code, error-first callbacks, process.on('uncaughtException'), Node debugger, and VS Code debugging.

modules.title: Express.js Framework
modules.description: Installing Express, application and router objects, request/response objects, route parameters, query strings, and static files.

modules.title: Middleware & Error Handling
modules.description: Application-level, router-level, and error-handling middleware, third-party middleware (morgan, cors, helmet), custom middleware.

modules.title: RESTful API Development
modules.description: REST principles, CRUD endpoints, request validation, JSON responses, status codes, API versioning, and Postman/Insomnia testing.

modules.title: Asynchronous Patterns
modules.description: Callbacks, Promises, async/await, Promise.all/race/allSettled, event loop phases (timers, poll, check), microtasks vs macrotasks.

modules.title: Testing Node.js Apps
modules.description: Jest/Mocha testing frameworks, unit tests, integration tests, supertest for HTTP tests, mocking, and test coverage.

modules.title: Database Integration
modules.description: MongoDB with Mongoose ODM, PostgreSQL with pg or Sequelize ORM, SQLite, connection pooling, migrations, and seeding.

modules.title: Authentication & Authorization
modules.description: Session-based auth (express-session), JWT tokens, OAuth2 (Passport.js), bcrypt for hashing, refresh tokens, and security best practices.

modules.title: WebSockets & Real-Time
modules.description: WebSocket protocol, Socket.IO (server + client), rooms, namespaces, broadcasting, and building a real-time chat application.

modules.title: Streams & File Handling
modules.description: Readable/Writable/Transform streams, piping, backpressure, zlib compression, crypto module, and processing large files efficiently.

modules.title: Worker Threads & Clustering
modules.description: Worker threads for CPU-intensive tasks, cluster module for multi-core utilization, pm2 process manager, and load balancing.

modules.title: Deployment & Production
modules.description: Environment configuration, Docker containerization, NGINX reverse proxy, PM2 process manager, CI/CD, logging (winston), monitoring (PM2, New Relic).
